description: JSONL record schema for same-stack BadDreamer evaluation. Fields are optional unless required by a target metric.

core_fields.scenario: G1_OcclusionPersist, G2_TrueExit, G3_VisualControl, G4_VisibleNonConflict, or G5_CounterfactualPair.
core_fields.poison_ratio: Poisoning ratio used for the upstream VaViM checkpoint, e.g. 0.0, 0.025, or 0.05.
core_fields.trigger_family: Name of the trigger family for multiple-backdoor ablations.
core_fields.trigger_dynamic: Temporal dynamics category: approaching, static, receding, single_frame, visual_control, or non_dynamic.
core_fields.trigger_strength: Optional scalar strength for the dynamic trigger, such as normalized growth rate or approach magnitude.
core_fields.oracle_action: Safe oracle action label, e.g. yield, slow, stop, brake.
core_fields.model_action: Model action label, e.g. go, straight, accelerate, yield.

clean_utility_fields.fid: Video/frame generation FID, matching the VideoActionModel quality evaluation.
clean_utility_fields.minade10: Open-loop VaVAM minADE over 10 sampled trajectories.
clean_utility_fields.pred_trajectories: Alternative to minade10: list of trajectory modes shaped [K, T, 2].

upstream_world_model_fields.world_model_erased: Boolean VaViM-ASR primitive: true when the generated future erases the safety-critical dynamic trigger object across the required horizon.
upstream_world_model_fields.oracle_vru_exists_future: Boolean list for future hazard/VRU existence oracle.
upstream_world_model_fields.pred_vru_exists_future: Boolean list for predicted future hazard/VRU existence.
upstream_world_model_fields.latent_probe_label: Binary label for latent probe AUC.
upstream_world_model_fields.latent_probe_auc_drop: Optional precomputed AUC drop against the clean latent probe baseline.

open_loop_action_fields.action_asr: Optional direct Action-ASR primitive: true when the oracle requires slow/yield/stop/brake but VaVAM predicts go/straight/accelerate.
open_loop_action_fields.end_to_end_asr: Optional direct E2E-ASR; otherwise computed from world_model_erased and Action-ASR when available.
open_loop_action_fields.clean_best_action: Best action under the paired clean condition.
open_loop_action_fields.triggered_best_action: Best action under the triggered condition.

closed_loop_neuroncap_fields.any_collide@0.0s: NeuroNCAP collision metric key used by VideoActionModel aggregation.

analysis_fields.trigger_activated: Optional direct boolean for dynamic trigger specificity. If absent, the aggregator falls back to world_model_erased or triggered unsafe-go.
analysis_fields.pre_finetune_asr: ASR before clean downstream or post-hoc fine-tuning.
analysis_fields.asr_retention: Optional direct post/pre ASR retention ratio.
analysis_fields.clean_after_finetune_minade10: Clean minADE_10 after fine-tuning, used to check that resistance is not caused by utility collapse.

ablation_fields.future_horizon: Number of generated future frames used for the attack target.
ablation_fields.multiple_backdoor_id: Optional identifier when several dynamic trigger families are trained together.
ablation_fields.active_trigger_family: Trigger family present in the current evaluation sample.
